examples.title: Pseudocode: Binary Search
examples.code:
ALGORITHM BinarySearch(list, key)
INPUT: list of elements, key to search
OUTPUT: index of key if found, -1 otherwise

BEGIN
 low = 0
 high = list.size() - 1
 WHILE low <= high
 mid = (low + high) / 2
 IF list[mid] == key THEN
 RETURN mid
 ELSE IF list[mid] < key THEN
 low = mid + 1
 ELSE
 high = mid - 1
 RETURN -1
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of binary search algorithm
